set(METALLIC_GENERATED_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/Generated")
set(METALLIC_RENDER_PASS_INCLUDE_HEADER "${METALLIC_GENERATED_DIR}/metallic_render_pass_includes.h")
file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${METALLIC_GENERATED_DIR}")
file(GLOB METALLIC_RENDER_PASS_HEADERS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering/Passes/*_pass.h"
)
list(SORT METALLIC_RENDER_PASS_HEADERS)
file(WRITE "${METALLIC_RENDER_PASS_INCLUDE_HEADER}"
    "#pragma once\n\n"
    "// Generated by Source/CMakeLists.txt. Include this from pass registration translation units.\n\n"
)
foreach(METALLIC_PASS_HEADER IN LISTS METALLIC_RENDER_PASS_HEADERS)
    file(TO_CMAKE_PATH "${METALLIC_PASS_HEADER}" METALLIC_PASS_HEADER_PATH)
    file(APPEND "${METALLIC_RENDER_PASS_INCLUDE_HEADER}"
        "#include \"${METALLIC_PASS_HEADER_PATH}\"\n"
    )
endforeach()
set(METALLIC_GENERATED_INCLUDE_DIR "${METALLIC_GENERATED_DIR}" PARENT_SCOPE)

if(APPLE)
    add_subdirectory(PipelineEditor)

    add_executable(Metallic
        main.cpp
        Platform/metal_impl.cpp
        Platform/metal_raytracing_utils.cpp
        Platform/metal_resource_utils.cpp
        Platform/metal_shader_utils.cpp
        Platform/metal_runtime.mm
        Platform/glfw_metal_bridge.mm
        Platform/imgui_metal_bridge.mm
        Platform/tracy_metal.mm
        Asset/mesh_loader.cpp
        Asset/meshlet_builder.cpp
        Asset/cluster_lod_builder.cpp
        Asset/material_loader.cpp
        Scene/scene.cpp
        Scene/scene_graph.cpp
        Scene/scene_graph_ui.cpp
        Rendering/input.cpp
        Rendering/frame_graph.cpp
        Rendering/gpu_scene.cpp
        Rendering/raytraced_shadows.cpp
        Rendering/render_pass.cpp
        Rendering/pass_registrations.cpp
        Helpers/slang_compiler.cpp
        Helpers/shader_manager.cpp
        Rendering/scene_context.cpp
        Rendering/scene_gpu.cpp
        RHI/Helpers/rhi_resource_utils.cpp
        RHI/Helpers/rhi_shader_utils.cpp
        RHI/Helpers/rhi_raytracing_utils.cpp
        RHI/Metal/metal_window_runtime.cpp
        RHI/Metal/metal_frame_graph.cpp
    )
    target_include_directories(Metallic PRIVATE
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI/Metal"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Platform"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Asset"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Scene"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering/Passes"
        "${METALLIC_GENERATED_DIR}"
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/External/stb"
    )
    target_link_libraries(Metallic PRIVATE
        metal-cpp
        glfw
        meshoptimizer
        imgui
        slang::slang
        MathLib
        tinygltf
        Tracy::TracyClient
        spdlog::spdlog_header_only
        PipelineEditorLib
        microprofile
        "-framework AppKit"
    )

    set_source_files_properties(Platform/tracy_metal.mm PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS "-fobjc-arc")
elseif(WIN32)
    add_subdirectory(PipelineEditor)

    find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)

    add_executable(Metallic
        main_vulkan.cpp
        Asset/material_loader.cpp
        Asset/mesh_loader.cpp
        Asset/meshlet_builder.cpp
        Asset/cluster_lod_builder.cpp
        PipelineEditor/pass_registry.cpp
        PipelineEditor/pipeline_asset.cpp
        PipelineEditor/pipeline_builder.cpp
        Scene/scene.cpp
        Scene/scene_graph.cpp
        Scene/scene_graph_ui.cpp
        Rendering/frame_graph.cpp
        Rendering/gpu_scene.cpp
        Rendering/input.cpp
        Rendering/pass_registrations_vulkan.cpp
        Rendering/raytraced_shadows.cpp
        Rendering/render_pass.cpp
        Rendering/scene_context.cpp
        Rendering/scene_gpu.cpp
        Helpers/slang_compiler.cpp
        Helpers/shader_manager.cpp
        Helpers/streamline_context.cpp
        RHI/rhi_backend.cpp
        RHI/Helpers/rhi_raytracing_utils.cpp
        RHI/Helpers/rhi_resource_utils.cpp
        RHI/Helpers/rhi_shader_utils.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/vulkan_backend.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/vulkan_frame_graph.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/vulkan_descriptor_manager.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/vulkan_descriptor_buffer.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/Helpers/vulkan_diagnostics.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/vulkan_pipeline_cache.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/vulkan_rt_pipeline.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/Helpers/vulkan_transient_allocator.cpp
        RHI/Vulkan/Helpers/vulkan_upload_service.cpp
    )
    target_include_directories(Metallic PRIVATE
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI/Vulkan"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/RHI/Vulkan/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Asset"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/PipelineEditor"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Scene"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering/Helpers"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Rendering/Passes"
        "${METALLIC_GENERATED_DIR}"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Platform"
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/External/MathLib"
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/External/meshoptimizer/src"
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/External/stb"
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/External/VulkanMemoryAllocator/include"
    )
    target_link_libraries(Metallic PRIVATE
        glfw
        meshoptimizer
        imgui
        slang::slang
        nlohmann_json
        tinygltf
        Tracy::TracyClient
        spdlog::spdlog_header_only
        microprofile
        Vulkan::Vulkan
    )

    # Streamline / DLSS integration (optional)
    if(METALLIC_ENABLE_STREAMLINE AND TARGET streamline::streamline)
        target_link_libraries(Metallic PRIVATE streamline::streamline)
        target_sources(Metallic PRIVATE
            Rendering/Passes/streamline_dlss_pass.cpp
        )
    endif()

    # Nsight Aftermath GPU crash tracking (optional)
    if(METALLIC_HAS_AFTERMATH)
        target_sources(Metallic PRIVATE
            RHI/Vulkan/Helpers/aftermath_tracker.cpp
            RHI/Vulkan/Helpers/aftermath_gpu_crash_tracker.cpp
        )
    endif()
endif()

target_compile_definitions(Metallic PRIVATE
    PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR="${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
)

target_link_libraries(Metallic PRIVATE metallic::nvtx3)

if(TARGET metallic::aftermath)
    target_link_libraries(Metallic PRIVATE metallic::aftermath)
endif()

if(WIN32)
    target_compile_definitions(Metallic PRIVATE NOMINMAX)
endif()

foreach(SLANG_RUNTIME_LIB ${METALLIC_SLANG_RUNTIME_LIBS})
    add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
            "${SLANG_RUNTIME_LIB}"
            "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>"
    )
endforeach()

# Copy Streamline runtime DLLs (Windows only)
if(WIN32 AND METALLIC_ENABLE_STREAMLINE AND METALLIC_STREAMLINE_RUNTIME_DLLS)
    foreach(SL_DLL ${METALLIC_STREAMLINE_RUNTIME_DLLS})
        add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
            COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
                "${SL_DLL}"
                "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>"
        )
    endforeach()
endif()

# Copy Nsight Aftermath runtime DLL (Windows only)
if(WIN32 AND METALLIC_HAS_AFTERMATH AND METALLIC_AFTERMATH_DLL)
    add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
            "${METALLIC_AFTERMATH_DLL}"
            "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>"
    )
endif()

add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Shaders"
        "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Shaders"
)

add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory
        "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Source/Rendering"
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Source/Rendering/visibility_constants.h"
        "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Source/Rendering/visibility_constants.h"
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Source/Rendering/hzb_constants.h"
        "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Source/Rendering/hzb_constants.h"
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
        "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Source/Rendering/hzb_spd_constants.h"
        "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Source/Rendering/hzb_spd_constants.h"
)

if(APPLE)
    add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
            "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Asset"
            "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Asset"
    )

    add_custom_command(TARGET Metallic POST_BUILD
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
            "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Pipelines"
            "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Metallic>/Pipelines"
    )
endif()
